en.extract:
The slaty cuckooshrike (Coracina schistacea) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the Sula and Banggai Islands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest.

The '''slaty cuckooshrike''' ('''''Coracina schistacea''''') is a [[species]] of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]], where it occurs in the [[Sula Islands|Sula]] and [[Banggai Island]]s. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical [[mangrove forest]].

zh.extract:
青灰鹃鵙（学名：Coracina schistacea）是山椒鸟科鸦鹃鵙属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。其自然栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地森林以及亚热带或热带的红树林。
